heading: Continuation of United States Advisory Commission on Public Diplomacy
label: 6553 Continuation of United States Advisory Commission on Public Diplomacy
text: The United States Advisory Commission on Public Diplomacy, established under and section 8 of Reorganization Plan Numbered 2 of 1977, shall continue to exist and operate under such provisions of law.section 1469 of this title
notes: References in TextSection 8 of Reorganization Plan Numbered 2 of 1977, referred to in text, is set out as a note under and in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.section 1461 of this title

Effective Date of 2016 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–323, title VII, § 702(b)130 Stat. 1940Dec. 16, 2016“The amendment made by subsection (a) [amending this section] shall take effect as of . Any lapse in powers, authorities, or responsibilities of the United States Advisory Commission on Public Diplomacy from the period beginning on , and ending on the date of the enactment of this Act [], shall be deemed to have not so lapsed.”October 1, 2016October 1, 2016Dec. 16, 2016
